headline: Mazda Motor Settles on PTC Inc. (PTC)’s Codebeamer for Software-Defined Vehicle Development
summary: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ: PTC) is one of the cheap robotics stocks to buy right now. On May 21, Mazda Motor Corporation selected PTC Inc. (NASDAQ: PTC)’s Codebeamer Application Lifecycle Management solution to support its software-defined vehicle development (SDV). The automaker is to leverage Codebeamer to standardize requirements testing and validation processes in vehicle development. The […]
